title: trisetaria myriantha
intro: Trisetaria myriantha, also known as giant hair grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Trisetaria myriantha are attributed to its saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to support the immune system. Trisetaria myriantha is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are used in traditional medicine to soothe coughs and reduce inflammation.
